chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2722 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16655/2023 2. For order as to maintainability of petition 25.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 05.9.2023, which is over two years ago, when a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, once again, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed / pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
